summary: This document is a Data Protection Addendum from Twilio outlining definitions and obligations regarding personal data processing under GDPR. It details categories of customer data, security incidents, and sensitive information handling relevant to the startup's use of Twilio's communication services. It serves as a foundational compliance artifact for the startup's adherence to UK data regulations.
